name: Seven
description: Seven — German SMS API provider with direct carrier connections for A2P and two-way SMS messaging.

seo.title: Seven — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Seven: Seven — German SMS API provider with direct carrier connections for A2P and two-way SMS messaging.

when_to_use: German A2P SMS with direct carrier connections
Two-way SMS for customer feedback collection in DACH
Transactional SMS for e-commerce notifications in Germany
OTP SMS delivery for German fintech authentication
Bulk SMS campaigns with high deliverability for Europe

pros: Direct carrier connections improve DE/EU delivery
Two-way SMS plus simple REST API
cons: Limited channels — no WhatsApp, RCS or voice core
Global reach thinner than Sinch or Twilio
Product scope focused, not expanding fast
review.verdict: Straightforward German SMS API with clean pricing and solid EU routes — a quiet alternative to the giants.
review.best_for: German and EU dev teams needing no-fuss A2P SMS with GDPR clarity
review.not_for: Teams wanting WhatsApp, RCS, voice, or deep US/APAC coverage
